description: Cyclone warning: Severe weather system approaching Mumbai coast. JNPT operations at risk.
Port congestion detected at JNPT. Current vessel count: 28 (62% of baseline 45). Cargo handling delays expected.
News signal: Port workers strike action announced at JNPT. Cargo handling suspended indefinitely.

raw_data.headline: Port workers strike action announced at JNPT. Cargo handling suspended indefinitely.

description: Red Sea crisis escalation. All vessels rerouting via Cape of Good Hope. +14 days transit time.

raw_data.headline: Red Sea crisis forces global shipping reroute via Cape of Good Hope

description: Heavy rainfall alert at Chennai Port. Wind 45 km/h, Rain 28mm in 3h. Severity 3/5.
